# home-assistant-mcp
> **AI-Powered Smart Home Control via Model Context Protocol** Transform your Home Assistant smart home into a conversational AI assistant. Control lights, climate, automations, and all your smart devic...

This project includes automated llms.txt generation for AI accessibility.
